unsupported_capabilities: multi-stage fir_tree with alternating lobe/neck widths per stage: the primitive rim_slot_stage_* parameters assume uniform stage geometry per stage with single neck/lobe width; alternating 4-stage {depth, hw} pairs where width alternates narrow→wide→narrow→wide across stages is not expressible in the current parameterisation

front-side dual seal grooves at specific diameter ranges (φ200–210 and φ220–230) with dedicated radial extents — the primitive seal_land parameters are uniform-pitch single-zone and cannot encode two non-identical seal land bands at distinct diameters on one face
safety_notes: This primitive produces non-flight reference geometry only; not airworthy, not certified, and not for manufacturing
All safety flags are true — the system cannot certify structural integrity, fatigue life, or manufacturing readiness
Generative CAD output would likewise be reference geometry only and could not satisfy airworthiness or certification requirements
